response.global_analysis:
1. Skit Dialogue: Dialogue matches the on-screen captions and audio exactly. Timed precisely to the vocal cues.
2. Song Performance: Audio matches the Japanese lyrics for 'Sekinin Shuugoutai' (責任集合体) by Masalada. The translation was structured to maintain semantic flow and match the song's manic, fast-paced rhythm.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to match vocal triggers and prevent cascading delays, maintaining logical grouping of sentences. No closed caption tags were included.

subtitles.original: よ、よく分かんないっす。ボクが言ったのはただの冗談で…
subtitles.english: I-I don't really know. I was just joking about that...

subtitles.original: もしかしてボク、無意識のうちに真実をつかんでいたのか！？
subtitles.english: What if I subconsciously knew the truth this whole time?!

subtitles.original: お前天才か！？
subtitles.english: Are you a genius?!

subtitles.original: おや、これはいよいよ事件解決…になってしまうのか？
subtitles.english: Oh my, could this possibly mean the case is solved?

subtitles.original: 事件解決しちゃった！
subtitles.english: I solved the case!

subtitles.original: 違う違う、私は凶器じゃないですよ。
subtitles.english: No, no. I'm not the murder weapon.

subtitles.original: 異議あり！さっき自白しただろ！
subtitles.english: OBJECTION! You already confessed!

subtitles.original: 私が言いたいのは、この事件にはまた別の古代兵器が関わっているかもしれないということ。
subtitles.english: What I mean is, maybe there was another ancient weapon involved.

subtitles.original: だから布に魔力が残っていたんだ。
subtitles.english: That would explain the magical residue on the cloth.

subtitles.original: なんだ、そういうことか…
subtitles.english: I guess that makes sense.

subtitles.original: ボクが事件を解決できたと思ったのに…
subtitles.english: But I wanted to solve the case...

subtitles.original: まあ次がんばれよ。
subtitles.english: You'll solve the next one.

subtitles.original: でもなぁ、現場の近くで変なものを見たっていう報告も届いてるんだ。
subtitles.english: But we've also gotten reports of people seeing strange things near the murder scene.

subtitles.original: その魔力の痕跡とやらが超常的な力によるものだって言うなら…
subtitles.english: If the involvement of something supernatural explains the magical residue,

subtitles.original: 変な幻覚が見えた人がいるのもそいつの影響ってこと？
subtitles.english: does it also cover those weird visions?

subtitles.original: それはまだ分かりませんが、謎は必ず解いてみせましょう。
subtitles.english: I'm not sure yet, but I'm going to find out.

subtitles.original: じゃあうちの捜査資料を持っていっていいよ。
subtitles.english: Then we will give you our case file to help out.

subtitles.original: 民間人にあげちゃダメっすよ！
subtitles.english: You can't give that to a civilian!

subtitles.original: でもこいつさぁ、なんか天才の匂いしね？
subtitles.english: But she seems like a genius, doesn't she?

subtitles.original: さっきはボクのこと天才って言ったじゃないですかぁ…
subtitles.english: But that was my thing...

subtitles.original: どんな情報でも助かりますよ。
subtitles.english: Any information you have would be useful.

subtitles.original: ただし！資料が欲しいなら、タダというわけにはいかんな！
subtitles.english: Fiiine! But if you want our files, then we need something in return.

subtitles.original: これ、また歌う流れですか？
subtitles.english: Could that thing be, perhaps, a song?

subtitles.original: おれは しらない なにも しらない
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know anything.

subtitles.original: なにも みてない だれも みてない
subtitles.english: I haven't seen anything, no one has seen anything.

subtitles.original: そらを みても みえない よるの
subtitles.english: Even if I look at the sky, I can't see the night's...

subtitles.original: かけた つきに うさぎ
subtitles.english: ...waning moon's rabbit.

subtitles.original: これは なんだ それが なにか？
subtitles.english: What is this? What of it?

subtitles.original: ここは たのし それで よろし
subtitles.english: Here it is fun, and that's fine.

subtitles.original: はしる にげる にがす そらす
subtitles.english: Run, flee, let loose, look away,

subtitles.original: 月の 欠けた 場所へ
subtitles.english: to the place where the moon has waned.

subtitles.original: あらら あらら あらら あらら あらら あらら あらら あらら あらら あらら
subtitles.english: Alara, alara, alara, alara, alara...

subtitles.original: もうそう とめどなく
subtitles.english: My delusions are endless.

subtitles.original: そうぞう とがめなく
subtitles.english: My creations are blameless.

subtitles.original: しょうどう おさまらず
subtitles.english: My impulses are relentless.

subtitles.original: なぜか なぜか なぜか なぜかしら？
subtitles.english: For some reason, why is that?

subtitles.original: 最悪だ！ 公序良俗を剥いで脱いで踊れ！
subtitles.english: It's the worst! Strip away public decency and dance!

subtitles.original: いや最低か！ なんでなんでつって なんかなんか高鳴って
subtitles.english: Or is it the absolute lowest! Why, oh why, is my heart thumping?

subtitles.original: 最悪だ！ どうもこうもしねぇよ勝手にしやがれ！
subtitles.english: It's the worst! I don't give a damn, do whatever you want!

subtitles.original: いや最低か！ いやーもうほんと 最悪だ！だ！だ！だ！だ！
subtitles.english: Or is it the absolute lowest! Man, it's really the worst!

subtitles.original: ねても さめても つきまとう
subtitles.english: Asleep or awake, it haunts me.

subtitles.original: みえぬ いしきの うらがわに
subtitles.english: Behind my unseen consciousness...

subtitles.original: おおきく あいた くろいあな
subtitles.english: ...is a gaping black hole.

subtitles.original: わかる わかる わかる
subtitles.english: I get it, I get it, I get it.

subtitles.original: ゆるす ゆるせん ゆるす ゆるせ
subtitles.english: Forgive, unforgivable, forgive, forgive!

subtitles.original: かわいい えへへ むふふ こわい
subtitles.english: Cute, ehehe, mufufu, scary.

subtitles.original: りんご ごりら らくご こちら なくだ だぼら らまだん
subtitles.english: Apple, gorilla, rakugo, here, camel, nonsense, ramadan.

subtitles.original: わたしたち ぜったいに みてません
subtitles.english: We absolutely didn't see anything!

subtitles.original: しってません きいてません しったこっちゃありません
subtitles.english: We didn't know, we didn't hear, we couldn't care less!

subtitles.original: 光をいっしっ 影にひとつ。 許されざる思考を 当てはまらない異常を 包んで生きていこうじゃありませんか！
subtitles.english: Why don't we wrap up our unforgivable thoughts and unclassifiable anomalies, and live on?

subtitles.original: こうどう なももたず
subtitles.english: Action, without even a name.

subtitles.original: きょうそう いみもなく
subtitles.english: Compete, without any meaning.

subtitles.original: えいがい じこまんぞく
subtitles.english: Movies, pure self-satisfaction.

subtitles.original: だから だから だから だからな！
subtitles.english: So, so, so, that's why!

subtitles.original: 最高だ！ 脳が効化してんだ ぶっ壊して叫べ！
subtitles.english: It's the best! My brain is melting down, break it and scream!

subtitles.original: いや最高か！ なんでなんでつって なんかまこまこはしゃいじゃって
subtitles.english: Or is it the absolute best! Why, oh why, am I frolicking around?

subtitles.original: 最高だ！ 豪気豪気で結構 勝手に生きたれ！
subtitles.english: It's the best! Being audacious is great, live however you want!

subtitles.original: いや最高か！ いやーもうほんと最高だ！だ！だ！だ！だ！
subtitles.english: Or is it the absolute best! Man, it's really the best!

subtitles.original: むかし むかしの おもいつき
subtitles.english: An idea from once upon a time.

subtitles.original: むいみ むいみの ひとだかり
subtitles.english: A meaningless, meaningless crowd of people.

subtitles.original: むじゃき むてきの うまれつき
subtitles.english: Innocent and invincible by birth.

subtitles.original: それが それが それが
subtitles.english: That is, that is, that is...

subtitles.original: むせきにん しゅうごうたい
subtitles.english: ...irresponsible collection.

subtitles.original: あんたも わたしも かんけいない むせきにん しゅうごうたい
subtitles.english: You, me, none of us are involved, irresponsible collection.

subtitles.original: たのしく やってりゃ もんだいない
subtitles.english: As long as we're having fun, there's no problem.

subtitles.original: おれは しらない なにも しらない なにも みてない なにも
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know anything, I haven't seen anything...
